scripts.backend:setup: npm --prefix ./apps/eventdb run db:schema && npm --prefix ./apps/api run db:read-model
scripts.setup:backend: npm --prefix ./apps/eventdb run db:schema && npm --prefix ./apps/api run db:read-model
scripts.full: sh -c 'npm --prefix ./apps/eventdb run dev & EVENTDB_PID=$!; npm --prefix ./apps/api run dev & API_PID=$!; npm --prefix ./apps/vite run dev; kill $EVENTDB_PID $API_PID 2>/dev/null || true'
scripts.fullstack: sh -c 'npm --prefix ./apps/eventdb run dev & EVENTDB_PID=$!; npm --prefix ./apps/api run dev & API_PID=$!; npm --prefix ./apps/vite run dev; kill $EVENTDB_PID $API_PID 2>/dev/null || true'
